description: Product description Sparkling glitter Martini Glass Shaped ornament for your Christmas Tree. Glam Cocktail themed decoration Choose Silver, Gold/Champagne, Rose Gold or Blue Ready to hang Decoration. Available in Modern and Traditional Colours to suit any Theme Featuring a distinctly festive sleigh design, this glittery decoration is perfect for adding a bit of glitz to your Christmas tree. Safety Warning Caution: This ornament contains small parts and glass. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not hang within reach of crib or bed. Avoid placing near heat sources or open flames.
